svg.title: CUDA vector addition benchmark
svg.desc: Bar chart showing execution time across 5 experiments on an RTX 3060, from 99.7ms (1 thread) down to 0.044ms (memory prefetch), a 2,256x speedup. Dual GPU experiment regressed to 0.11ms due to coordination overhead.
svg.text: Log scale · Vector addition benchmark · github.com/mikeest1972/gpu_add
